title: taxillus nigrans var. longifolius
intro: Taxillus nigrans var. longifolius, also known as the Chinese gall, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Santalaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting blood circulation. In herbal preparations, Taxillus nigrans var. longifolius is often combined with other herbs to make teas, capsules, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
